title: Silent Result discard with let _ = in collect_regex_patterns
description: collect_regex_patterns (lib.rs line 458) calls for_each_clause with a closure that always returns Ok(()), then discards the Result with 'let _ ='. The intent is to reuse for_each_clause for side-effect traversal. Idiomatic alternatives: (a) give for_each_clause an infallible variant that takes FnMut(&[Form]) with no Result, or (b) use .expect("infallible") with a comment so future changes to the closure that introduce fallibility are caught at runtime instead of silently discarded. The current let _ = hides any future mistake.
